CheckTitle: Linode Cloud Firewall inbound rules are configured
Description: Linode Cloud Firewalls are checked to determine whether inbound rules are explicitly configured.
Risk: When inbound rules are not configured, ingress filtering will not be enforced.

Code.Other:
1. Log in to the Linode Cloud Manager
2. Navigate to Firewalls
3. Select the associated firewall
4. Click Add an Inbound Rule in the Rules tab

Recommendation.Text: Configure inbound rules to explicitly define allowed ingress traffic and enforce expected security boundaries.
